# Intent: Authentication

## Goal
Enable users to securely access and leave the application.

## Stakeholders
- **User**: needs to log in and out reliably

## Success Criteria
- Users can log in with email and password
- Users can log out and have their session terminated

## Constraints
- Sessions must expire after 24 hours

## Status
- **State:** active
- **Created:** 2026-01-01
